mapper.select:
SELECT fac_code, fac_name, fac_class_name, inspect_cycle, process_date last_process_date, insp_class_name
FROM (SELECT f.fac_code, f.fac_name, get_mes_sub_code_name(f.fac_class_code) fac_class_name, f.inspect_cycle, i.process_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY f.fac_code ORDER BY i.process_date DESC) rn, i.insp_class_code, get_mes_sub_code_name(i.insp_class_code) insp_class_name FROM fac f LEFT JOIN fac_insp i ON(f.fac_code=i.fac_code)) WHERE rn=1
AND fac_name LIKE '%'||#{facName}||'%'
ANd process_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{processDate1}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{processDate2}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
SELECT sub_code, sub_code_name FROM mes_sub_code WHERE main_code='GR'
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'INST'||(NVL(MAX(order_num),0) + 1) AS fac_insp_code FROM ( SELECT TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(fac_insp_code,5)) AS order_num FROM fac_insp )
INSERT INTO fac_insp (fac_insp_code, fac_code, registration_date, process_date, emp_code, insp_class_code) VAlUES (#{facInspCode}, #{facCode}, sysdate, #{processDate}, #{empCode}, 'CD2')
mapper.select:
SELECT fac_insp_code, fac_code, find_fac_name(fac_code) fac_name, get_mes_sub_code_name(insp_class_code) insp_class_name, registration_date, process_date, process_history, process_result, note FROM fac_insp WHERE process_result IS NULL
AND find_fac_name(fac_code) LIKE '%'||#{facName}||'%'
ANd process_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{processDate1}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{processDate2}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
mapper.update: UPDATE fac_not SET NOT_END_DATE=sysdate WHERE fac_code=#{facCode} AND fac_not_reason_code='NF2'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fac_not(fac_not_code, fac_code, emp_code, not_start_date, fac_not_reason_code, note) VALUES(AUTO_FACNOT_CODE(), #{facCode}, #{empCode}, sysdate, 'NF4', #{note})
